Package com.saperion.config

Class SaJMXFileProperties

java.lang.Object
java.util.Dictionary<K,V>
java.util.Hashtable<Object,Object>
java.util.Properties
com.saperion.config.SaAbstractJMXProperties
com.saperion.config.SaJMXFileProperties
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, Map<Object,Object>, DynamicMBean
public class SaJMXFileProperties extends SaAbstractJMXProperties
Defines the properties of a configuration file as MBean.
Implements the abstract class SaAbstractJMXProperties.
Author:
rbo
